title: oxalis calcaria
intro: Oxalis calcaria, also known as Sensitive Plant, is a type of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family. It is a perennial plant native to South America, known for its delicate white or pink flowers and compound leaves that fold up when touched. Oxalis calcaria has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and boosted immune system.
